columns.extraction_plan: On page 8, in the "DISCUSSION" section, the text states: "Reported use of docetaxel within 1 year after first progression was higher among patients allocated to SOC + AAP (32% SOC-alone and 40% SOC + AAP, Chi-square P = .048)." The treatment arm is "SOC + AAP".

On page 8, in the "DISCUSSION" section, the text states: "Reported use of docetaxel within 1 year after first progression was higher among patients allocated to SOC + AAP (32% SOC-alone and 40% SOC + AAP, Chi-square P = .048)." The control arm is "SOC-alone".
